title: Savory Tunisian Sesame Seed Crumble
description: A light and crispy savory dish featuring a unique blend of sesame seeds mixed with sugar for a sweet and savory treat that’s perfect as an afternoon snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: 1 cup raw sesame seeds
ingredients.notes: Roasted for added depth of flavor

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons sugar
ingredients.amount: stirred in with the seeds and mixed well

instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Spread the sesame seeds out on a baking sheet.
Mix in the sugar and a pinch of salt until all the seeds are coated evenly. Ensure they are not too dry as this will affect their crispiness.
Bake for about 5-8 minutes or until the seeds turn golden brown but are still crunchy to touch.
Once done, let it cool slightly before serving to prevent dropping hot crumbs.
